title: Golden Globes 2026: Awards Winner Predictions & Odds
text: Best Actress – Comedy/Musical Predictions and Odds. Front-runner: Rose Byrne is positioned as the category leader with strong projected odds across major forecasting platforms. Odds & Projections: The Action Network forecasts place Byrne in the 'mid-70% range'. Gold Derby's consensus lists her closer to '88%,' giving her 'one of the strongest projected paths to a win on the night'. Analysis: Byrne enters as the clear favorite in this acting category, with forecasters across multiple platforms favoring her candidacy significantly over her competition. The category featured competitive prediction markets on Kalshi, with odds reflecting Byrne's strong positioning as the likely winner while Stone offered attractive odds for those seeking value picks.
